today_in_history_posts.title: BIP 158 Flexibility and Filter Size
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Laolu submitted a PR to modify BIP 158, enhancing security and functionality.
- Proposed changes eliminate extended filters, adjust gcs parameters, and modify data use.
- Conflicting node data suggests clients verify by reconstructing filters to maintain integrity.

today_in_history_posts.title: New idea on decentralized identity and truth (Re: Numerifides)
today_in_history_posts.summary: - The author proposed a decentralized identity system using Lightning for node queries.  - Payment is required per query, with a cost implication based on query popularity and length.  - Future applications could include localized recommendations paid for by Bitcoin spending advertisers.

today_in_history_posts.title: FE'd Up Covenants
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The paper introduces a method to add covenants to Bitcoin using Functional Encryption and Zero Knowledge Proofs.
- This approach allows for more detailed transaction control and enhances Bitcoin's security and functionality.
- The integration aims to maintain user privacy and could transform Bitcoin into a more versatile platform.
